hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not f: sys.exit(0)
if re.search(r'/src/tcfuse/data/predictions/', f):
    msg = f'Prediction module edited: {f} — check if .cursor/skills/tcfuse-predictions/ and .claude/commands/predictions.md need updating.'
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
elif re.search(r'/src/|/scripts/|/conf/', f) and not re.search(r'\\.cursor/|\\.claude/', f):
    msg = f'Pipeline file edited: {f} — check if .cursor/rules/tcfuse-core.mdc or the relevant .cursor/skills/<topic>/SKILL.md needs updating.'
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
